descriptionText: Sanlorenzo SD118 For Sale 2024|Guest Cabins:8|Crew Cabins:5The Sanlorenzo SD118 For Sale 2024 represents one of the most balanced and thoughtful designs in the semi‑displacement yacht market, and this pre‑owned 2024 model is presented in good condition. As part of Sanlorenzo’s historic SD line, the SD118 extends the brand’s long-standing philosophy of combining long‑range capability, comfortable cruising, and a refined onboard lifestyle. At 35.75 metres, she offers generous volumes and carefully planned spaces that make her well suited for extended cruising or relaxed coastal trips.Yacht Main Specifications: • Brand: Sanlorenzo • Year: 2024 • Length: 35.75 m • Max Beam: 8 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 2.1 m • Gross Tonnage: 290 GT • Fuel Tank: 32,000 l • Water Tank: 4,000 l • Engines: 2 x MAN CERT 8V 1622 HP • Guest Cabins: 8 guests in 4 ensuite cabins • Crew: 5The exterior design, created by Zuccon International Project, brings a more contemporary profile to the SD series while respecting the classic proportions that have defined this range. One of the key features of the Sanlorenzo SD118 For Sale 2024 is the split‑level forward area. This space connects the upper deck and forward deck into one coherent outdoor zone with direct access from the owner’s cabin, giving the yacht a practical and private place for relaxation. At the stern, the yacht offers a large, versatile area that transforms into a 19‑square‑metre swim platform when at anchor. The fold‑out side terraces enlarge the connection to the water and provide an enjoyable area for sunbathing or diving.Another hallmark of this model is the asymmetrical upper deck layout. Sanlorenzo introduced this concept to increase usable space and improve the flow between indoor and outdoor areas. On the port side, a full side deck runs seamlessly from aft to bow, and the bulwark can be opened to create a terrace. On the starboard side, the wide‑body design allows for expanded interior volume and unobstructed sea views from the saloon. The result is a comfortable, thoughtfully arranged deck plan that enhances time spent on board.Inside, this Sanlorenzo SD118 For Sale 2024 features a contemporary interior style that blends clean design with subtle detailing. The décor reflects Sanlorenzo’s focus on quality craftsmanship without appearing overly formal. The arrangement accommodates up to eight guests in four ensuite cabins, providing suitable privacy and comfort for family cruising or hosting friends. The crew area for five ensures smooth service and efficient operation during longer passages.Powered by twin MAN CERT 8V 1622 HP engines, the yacht offers capable performance for a semi‑displacement vessel of her size. With 32,000 litres of fuel capacity, she is built for extended autonomy, allowing owners to undertake longer journeys with ease. The yacht’s FRP construction keeps weight manageable while maintaining strength, contributing to her balanced handling and efficiency.Overall, the Sanlorenzo SD118 For Sale 2024 is an appealing opportunity for a buyer seeking a modern yacht with thoughtful features, generous volumes, and reliable cruising characteristics. Being a 2024 model and in good condition, she offers the advantage of a nearly new yacht with immediate availability.
descriptionHtml:
Sanlorenzo SD118 For Sale 2024|Guest Cabins:8|Crew Cabins:5

The Sanlorenzo SD118 For Sale 2024 represents one of the most balanced and thoughtful designs in the semi‑displacement yacht market, and this pre‑owned 2024 model is presented in good condition. As part of Sanlorenzo’s historic SD line, the SD118 extends the brand’s long-standing philosophy of combining long‑range capability, comfortable cruising, and a refined onboard lifestyle. At 35.75 metres, she offers generous volumes and carefully planned spaces that make her well suited for extended cruising or relaxed coastal trips.

Yacht Main Specifications:
• Brand: Sanlorenzo
• Year: 2024
• Length: 35.75 m
• Max Beam: 8 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 2.1 m
• Gross Tonnage: 290 GT
• Fuel Tank: 32,000 l
• Water Tank: 4,000 l
• Engines: 2 x MAN CERT 8V 1622 HP
• Guest Cabins: 8 guests in 4 ensuite cabins
• Crew: 5

The exterior design, created by Zuccon International Project, brings a more contemporary profile to the SD series while respecting the classic proportions that have defined this range. One of the key features of the Sanlorenzo SD118 For Sale 2024 is the split‑level forward area. This space connects the upper deck and forward deck into one coherent outdoor zone with direct access from the owner’s cabin, giving the yacht a practical and private place for relaxation. At the stern, the yacht offers a large, versatile area that transforms into a 19‑square‑metre swim platform when at anchor. The fold‑out side terraces enlarge the connection to the water and provide an enjoyable area for sunbathing or diving.

Another hallmark of this model is the asymmetrical upper deck layout. Sanlorenzo introduced this concept to increase usable space and improve the flow between indoor and outdoor areas. On the port side, a full side deck runs seamlessly from aft to bow, and the bulwark can be opened to create a terrace. On the starboard side, the wide‑body design allows for expanded interior volume and unobstructed sea views from the saloon. The result is a comfortable, thoughtfully arranged deck plan that enhances time spent on board.

Inside, this Sanlorenzo SD118 For Sale 2024 features a contemporary interior style that blends clean design with subtle detailing. The décor reflects Sanlorenzo’s focus on quality craftsmanship without appearing overly formal. The arrangement accommodates up to eight guests in four ensuite cabins, providing suitable privacy and comfort for family cruising or hosting friends. The crew area for five ensures smooth service and efficient operation during longer passages.

Powered by twin MAN CERT 8V 1622 HP engines, the yacht offers capable performance for a semi‑displacement vessel of her size. With 32,000 litres of fuel capacity, she is built for extended autonomy, allowing owners to undertake longer journeys with ease. The yacht’s FRP construction keeps weight manageable while maintaining strength, contributing to her balanced handling and efficiency.

Overall, the Sanlorenzo SD118 For Sale 2024 is an appealing opportunity for a buyer seeking a modern yacht with thoughtful features, generous volumes, and reliable cruising characteristics. Being a 2024 model and in good condition, she offers the advantage of a nearly new yacht with immediate availability.
